zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Eaton於1416年出生在英國爾伊頓時，她的父親John Eton26歲，母親Elen De Eton Manley25歲。她於1432年與Ralph Grosvenor在英國爾伊頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年在她的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Eaton于1416年出生在英国爾伊頓时，她的父亲John Eton26岁，母亲Elen De Eton Manley25岁。她于1432年与Ralph Grosvenor在英国爾伊頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年在她的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Eaton or Eton, such as Eaton Socon (Bedfordshire), Eaton (Cheshire), or Eton (Buckinghamshire), named from either Old English ēa ‘river’ or ēg ‘island, low-lying land’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: Nathaneal Eaton, born in Coventry, England, c. 1609, came to MA in 1637 and was the first head of Harvard College, in 1638–39.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Eaton was born in 1416, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, her father, John Eton, was 26 and her mother, Elen De Eton Manley, was 25. She married Ralph Grosvenor in 1432, in Eaton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1458, in her hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Eaton est née en 1416, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Eton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elen De Eton Manley, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Grosvenor en 1432, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1458, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Eaton 1416 in Eaton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Eton 26 und ihre Mutter Elen De Eton Manley 25. Sie hat 1432 in Eaton, Cheshire, England Ralph Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1458 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Eaton è nata il nel 1416 nel Eaton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, John Eton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elen De Eton Manley, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Grosvenor nel 1432, nel Eaton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1458, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Eatonが1416年にイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンで生まれた時，父John Etonは26歳，母Elen De Eton Manleyは25歳であった。1432年にイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンでRalph Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Eaton(이)가 1416년 영국 체실르 이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Eton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elen De Eton Manley(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 체실르 이턴에서 Ralph Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Eaton nasceu em 1416, em Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Eton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elen De Eton Manley, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Grosvenor em 1432, em Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1458, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Eaton родилась в 1416 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Eton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen De Eton Manley, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Grosvenor в 1432 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1458 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Eaton nació en 1416, en Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Eton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elen De Eton Manley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ralph Grosvenor en 1432, en Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1458, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
